items.title: Best Dividend Aristocrats For February 2026
items.description: Dividend Aristocrats lagged the S&P 500 in 2025 but started 2026 strong.

items.title: Major fried chicken franchisee closes stores in bankruptcy filing
items.description: Hamburger chains dominated the fast-food sector in the 1980s and 90s after the "burger wars" launched among McDonald's, Burger King, and Wendy's. The burger wars transitioned into an original chicken sandwich wars also in the 1980s among the same three rivals and was revived in the new millennium ...
